title: phegopteris polycarpa
intro: Phegopteris polycarpa, also known as the many-fruited polypody or many-fruit polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, Phegopteris polycarpa has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. In herbal preparations, Phegopteris polycarpa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
